list.name: Changes
list.comment: add utility functions and update styles for improved UI consistency

task.summary: initialize Personal Finance Tracker project with Maven and Spring Boot setup
add UI/UX flow documentation for dashboard, transaction list, reports, categories, and recurring rules
initialize frontend project with Vite, React, and Tailwind CSS setup
add Dashboard component and update routing in App.jsx
add Tailwind CSS integration and refactor main.jsx for cleaner imports

MESSAGE.value: initialize Personal Finance Tracker project with Maven and Spring Boot setup
add UI/UX flow documentation for dashboard, transaction list, reports, categories, and recurring rules
initialize frontend project with Vite, React, and Tailwind CSS setup
add Dashboard component and update routing in App.jsx
add Tailwind CSS integration and refactor main.jsx for cleaner imports
add utility functions and update styles for improved UI consistency

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: add utility functions and update styles for improved UI consistency
